canvas.title: Key Partners
canvas.subtitle: Who do you work with?
canvas.description: Suppliers, partners, and strategic alliances, along with their motivations and the resources they provide.

canvas.title: Key Activities
canvas.subtitle: What do you do?
canvas.description: Activities necessary to build the product and solve problems are listed. Also includes activity differentiators and innovators.

canvas.title: Key resources
canvas.subtitle: What do you work with?
canvas.description: Physical, human, and financial resources, along with assets for production and resources for key activities. Also includes scalers, or resources that can be increased to meet demand.

canvas.title: Value Propositions
canvas.subtitle: Why buy?
canvas.description: Unique value that the product offers to different types of customers, as well as its unique features.

canvas.title: Customer Relationships
canvas.subtitle: How communicated?
canvas.description: How the business communicates with and services its customers, including any communities it may have.

canvas.title: Channels
canvas.subtitle: How sold?
canvas.description: The business's market approach and its distribution and communication channels.

canvas.title: Customer Segments
canvas.subtitle: For whom?
canvas.description: The business's customers and their problems, along with personas, competitive products, and early adopters.

canvas.title: Cost Structure
canvas.subtitle: Who?
canvas.description: Costs related to product creation and delivery, as well as how costs are allocated between development, marketing, and fees. Also includes cost differentiators and innovative cost structures.

canvas.title: Revenue Streams
canvas.subtitle: How do you earn money?
canvas.description: The business's funding and revenue streams.
